message:
security: harden multipart/query parsing, fail-fast on missing CSPRNG

Critical fixes from deep code review:

- password.rs: Fail with panic when /dev/urandom unavailable instead of
  using weak entropy fallback (CSPRNG is non-negotiable for salts)
- multipart.rs: Fix off-by-one in boundary detection that could miss
  boundaries at exact buffer end
- multipart.rs: Validate filenames against path traversal (../, \, null)
- multipart.rs: Fix unquote() panic on single-character quoted input
- query.rs: Limit query params to 256 to prevent algorithmic DoS

Beads: bd-1s5b, bd-16jv, bd-14j6, bd-t0tp, bd-35ep

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
